title: Dilip Kumar – Tributes To A Legend
desc: Celebrate the voice of a generation with songs immortalized by the charisma of Dilip Kumar. Soul-stirring ghazals, patriotic numbers, and emotional ballads that reflect a cinematic titan’s journey.

title: Masti Bhare Geet
desc: Feel-good songs to groove to. Perfect for boosting your mood and adding fun to any moment – pure, carefree energy!

title: Blissful Beats
desc: Soothing melodies that calm your soul. Let these peaceful tunes create your perfect moment of serenity. A carefully curated collection of rhythms to help you unwind.

title: Disco Dancer
desc: Bring back the flashy disco vibes with this sensational Disco Dancer jukebox. Whether you're a retro lover or a new-age dancer, these beats will keep you moving!

title: Gane Naye Purane
desc: Relive the golden era of music with classic melodies, retro rhythms, and timeless tunes that never fade. A nostalgic trip for true old-school lovers!

title: Kumar Sanu Alka Yagnik
desc: Fall in love all over again with Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik! Their magical duets—full of passion, heartbreak, and nostalgia—are pure 90s gold.
